properties.name: Excalidraw Editor Canvas
properties.description: The Excalidraw canvas treated as a form: the analyst edits the scene and the board name is the canvas binding.

properties.name: Project Picker
properties.description: Modal that lists registered projects and lets the analyst activate one.

properties.name: Snapshot Browser
properties.description: Panel listing past board snapshots with element-level diff and a restore action.

properties.name: Render Markdown Dialog
properties.description: Dialog to pick a markdown render subtype and optional related entity/uc/form id.
